title: Service Description
description: This schema represents the top-level (root) object of the model that specifies a Service Description.

id.description: A unique persistent identifier of the service within a global context.

name.description: The full name (and acronym, if any) of the service.

description.description: A brief summary of the service.

version.description: The current version of the service.

additional-information.description: Additional Information on the Information Service.

filtering-available.description: Description of how responses from the service can be filtered.

source-of-information.description: Source of information returned by the service.

support-availability.description: Overview of support offered to consumers.
